title: Create: Atomic
description: Create: Atomic adds a new way to generate kinetic energy by leveraging the power of the atom!
body:
Need a server to play with friends? Don't know how to setup one? Just rent an already configured server!

[**![Bisecthosting Promotion](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/573219c7-5f37-4ad6-a8e0-e705870c7d85.png)**](https://bisecthosting.com/mrhminer) **About:** Create: Atomic adds a new way to generate kinetic energy by leveraging the power of the atom! Build large multi-block Nuclear reactor, to power turbines which generate large amount of SU, however make sure to not get carried away our you might end up having a meltdown! **Content** * Multi-block Nuclear Reactor * Steam Turbine * Radioisotope Heat Generator * Various modular reactor components
